# ============================================================
# JupyterLab Docker 依赖清单
# 从本地 conda 环境 "Jupyter" 迁移 (2026-02-23)
# ============================================================

# ── JupyterLab 核心 ─────────────────────────────────────────
jupyterlab

# ── 科学计算 & 数据分析 ─────────────────────────────────────
numpy
pandas
scipy
scikit-learn
statsmodels
tableone
tabulate
patsy
joblib

# ── 数据可视化 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
matplotlib
seaborn
plotly
ipympl

# ── 数据格式 / IO ──────────────────────────────────────────
openpyxl
beautifulsoup4
requests
aiofiles
aiosqlite
pillow

# ── JupyterLab 插件 & 增强 ─────────────────────────────────
ipywidgets
anywidget
jupyter-resource-usage
jupyter-lsp
jupyterlab-lsp>=5.0                 # v5+ 兼容 JupyterLab 4
jupyterlab-execute-time
jupyterlab-spreadsheet-editor
jupyterlab-pdf-preview
jupyterlab-diff
jupyterlab-eventlistener
lckr-jupyterlab-variableinspector
